name: team espn win rates with year splits
description: Regression test for ESPN columns with year splits to prevent duplicate player rows
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2022,2023,2024]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('QB')), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" = 'REG' and "nfl_games"."year" in (2022, 2023, 2024) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2022, 2023, 2024) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "ta4a43959d320efd1287471e098ae0de4"."pass_block_win_rate" AS "espn_team_pass_block_win_rate_0", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "espn_team_win_rates_index" as "ta4a43959d320efd1287471e098ae0de4" on "ta4a43959d320efd1287471e098ae0de4"."team" = "player_year_teams"."team" and ta4a43959d320efd1287471e098ae0de4.year = player_years.year and ta4a43959d320efd1287471e098ae0de4.year IN (2022,2023,2024) where player.pos IN ('QB') group by player.fname, player.lname, "ta4a43959d320efd1287471e098ae0de4"."pass_block_win_rate", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 10
